column_mapping.age_group: CASE WHEN FLOOR(months_between(current_date(), CAST(date_of_birth AS date)) / 12) < 18 THEN 'Minor' WHEN FLOOR(months_between(current_date(), CAST(date_of_birth AS date)) / 12) BETWEEN 18 AND 25 THEN 'Young Adult' WHEN FLOOR(months_between(current_date(), CAST(date_of_birth AS date)) / 12) BETWEEN 26 AND 35 THEN 'Adult'  WHEN FLOOR(months_between(current_date(), CAST(date_of_birth AS date)) / 12) BETWEEN 36 AND 45 THEN 'Mid Age' WHEN FLOOR(months_between(current_date(), CAST(date_of_birth AS date)) / 12) BETWEEN 46 AND 60 THEN 'Senior' ELSE 'Elder' END
column_mapping.income_band: CASE WHEN income < 25000 THEN 'Low' WHEN income BETWEEN 25000 AND 50000 THEN 'Lower-Middle' WHEN income BETWEEN 50001 AND 100000 THEN 'Middle' ELSE 'High' END
